---
title: "Compute per day diet alpha diversity for every patient using qiime2"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse) 
```


```{r}
dtb <- read_csv('../data/152_combined_DTB.csv') 
```

```{r}
fcts <-  dtb %>% 
  mutate(fid = str_glue('{pid}d{fdrt}')) %>% 
  select(fid, Food_code, dehydrated_weight) %>% 
  group_by(fid, Food_code) %>% 
  summarise(daily_de_wt = sum(dehydrated_weight)) %>% 
  spread(key = 'fid', value = 'daily_de_wt', fill = 0) 

fcts %>% 
  write_tsv('../data/005_food_code_counts_matrix.tsv')
```
